NOW OPEN IN WEST MIDTOWN
Meet The Grove, the newest member of the Monday Night Brewing family, featuring award-winning beer, curated cocktails, hand-crafted coffee and pizza, good vibes, outdoor hangs, chill happy hours, and lively late nights right on a NEW section of the Beltline 90ft from our original location.
The Space
Check out what’s offered at The Grove
30 draft beers available year-round on tap, rounding out your Monday Night Brewing favorites and limited releases as they come and go
Twin Italian-built pizza ovens with an expanded pizza menu (gluten free options available too!)
20-foot outdoor LED TV screen to give you the best seat in the house for watching all things sports, live events, and more
17,000+ sq. ft. of amphitheater-style outdoor space with fire pits, communal tables, and covered seating options
Event Calendar
book your Private event HERE
Our West Midtown campus has lots of great options for Private Events.
The Greenhouse is a fully-dedicated private events facility with updated and elevated finishes. An elegant venue worthy of rehearsal dinners, wedding welcomes, and receptions
The Grove offers a private mezzanine that can be rented for happy hours and engagement parties, as well as a conference room perfect for board meetings, along with indoor and outdoor spaces for smaller gatherings.

--- Page: /about ---
About - Monday Night Brewing
About
Monday Night Brewing originally grew out of a small Atlanta Bible study. We started brewing beer together on Monday nights back in 2006 as a way to get to know each other better. As we learned more about brewing (and each other), we started making better, more complex beers. Friends, neighbors, and random strangers started joining us in our driveway to brew and commune together. Beer quickly became more than just a weeknight hobby.
Back in our homebrewing days, our three founders (
Jeff
,
Joel
, and
Jonathan
) had white collar day jobs. They wore neckties to work and would ceremoniously loosen their ties on Monday evenings before brewing that week’s batch of beer. The loosened necktie has remained with us as a symbol of doing what you love with your career, and making every day (not just weekends) exceptional.
We spent almost 5 years perfecting our beers before bringing them to market, launching in 2011 in Atlanta. Our
West Midtown
location opened up in early 2013, and is focused on core beer production and small batch hoppy beers. In September 2017, we opened our second facility. Monday Night
Garage
, located in southwest Atlanta, is our home for barrel-aged, sour beers and experimentation. Plus dinosaurs.
Meet The Staff
Careers at Monday Night
Giving Back

--- Page: /west-midtown-private-events ---
Host Your Event at The Grove and The Greenhouse - Monday Night Brewing
Host Your Event at The Grove and The Greenhouse
The Greenhouse is our newly renovated, fully dedicated private events facility. It’s part of our expended West Midtown campus,  Monday Night Grove, which also includes our stunning new taproom.
The Greenhouse is a light-filled, sophisticated space for all types of gatherings – from networking events and corporate meetings, to wedding celebrations and dance parties. And, of course, from a private bar to updated A/V and robust catering options – we can provide everything you need to make your event a smash.
In addition the The Greenhouse, our public taproom – The Grove – offers space for smaller gatherings in The Mezzanine, overlooking our interior bar area, and The Moon Room, a well-appointed private conference room.
View Our Private Events Gallery

THE GREENHOUSE
The Greenhouse
is a stand-alone events space on our West Midtown campus, highlighted by polished concrete floors, elegant tile, copious greenery and natural light, and private bar. Add in plentiful outdoor space, convenient location and easy parking, and The Greenhouse is an easy choice for any occasion.
Ideal for:
Weddings and celebrations
Corporate meetings, mixers and volunteer appreciation events
Low-key kickbacks or major ragers
Contact Us
The Mezzanine
Gather above it all inside The Grove taproom. This spacious loft is like a stadium suite, but inside our taproom. A great spot for up to 40 people, with a large screen TV, comfortable couches and padded captain’s chair stools – perched above the action. We can even supply a private bartender.
Ideal for:
Post-work happy hours
Private watch parties
Birthday celebrations
After-parties
Submit an Inquiry
The Moon room
A sophisticated and private meeting space with luxe seating, conference table and A/V.
Ideal for:
Board meetings or corporate off-sites
A deluxe fantasy football draft
Submit an Inquiry
The Patio
A breezy, covered outdoor space for casual gatherings.
Ideal for:
Company mixers and networking events.
Parent meet-ups or alumni gatherings.
Submit an Inquiry

meta.meta_description: The Grove, a new taproom by Monday Night Brewing, is taking over for the West Midtown location in August 2025.
